title: Add kurta suit product image with Lookout button linking to Amazon

requirements.summary: Add a promotional section to ProductBrowse displaying the pink kurta suit image with a 'Lookout' button that opens an Amazon affiliate link in a new tab
acceptanceCriteria: The pink kurta suit image is visible in the ProductBrowse page as a promotional section.
A 'Lookout' button is rendered directly below the image.
Clicking the 'Lookout' button opens https://amzn.to/4rGaVQa in a new browser tab.
The section is styled consistently with the existing promotional sections (e.g., WatchProductSection, MeeshoProductSection).

file_operations.description: Create a new promotional component that displays the pink kurta suit image (frontend/public/assets/generated/kurta-suit-pink.dim_600x800.jpg) with a 'Lookout' button below it. The button should open https://amzn.to/4rGaVQa in a new tab using target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer'. Style the component consistently with existing promotional sections like WatchProductSection and MeeshoProductSection, using lazy-loaded images with loading states and the same card/button styling patterns.

Import and render the KurtaSuitProductSection component in the ProductBrowse page. Position it after the existing promotional sections (WatchProductSection, MeeshoProductSection, AttackOnTitanGallery) and before the filterable product grid. Ensure the section integrates seamlessly with the existing layout and spacing of other promotional components on the page.
